ApexClass.description: Setup-only class that verifies Tooling API reachability via Named Credential. Called by metaMapperApp on mount. Checks MetaMapper_Application_Access custom permission before any callout - unauthorized users must not trigger Named Credential network calls. Returns one of six status codes: AUTHORIZED, UNAUTHORIZED, PERMISSION_SET_MISSING, CALLOUT_FORBIDDEN, UNREACHABLE, TIMEOUT.
